/*
 * RGB PANEL Initialization Script
 *
 * Date            : 2023/4/13
 * Chip Type       : IT9860
 * Resolution      : 1280x720
 * Color format    : RGB565
 * PANEL interface : 24-bits
 * Build version   : PANEL initial script editor Ver. 0.0.0.378
 * SHA1 hash       : a1bb6f2183bfce2080db69622dc1a194c9c09a60
 */

/* ************************************************* */
/*               Please don't remove!                */
/* ************************************************* */
/*@@*/

/* ************************************************* */
/*     IT9860, RGB Interface mode, Clock Setting     */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD8000028, 0x002AA801);    // DCLK PLL2_OUT1
WRITE(0xD0000114, 0x00000000);    // DCLK output  Delay setting

/* ************************************************* */
/*              PLL2 ck2_n1,ck2_n2, 74.25mhz         */
/* ************************************************* */

//pll2_n2
WRITE(0xD8000118, 0x20363001);
WRITE(0xD800011c, 0x80000000);
WRITE(0xD800011c, 0xF3000000);
wait(220);                       //IDLE 220
WRITE(0xD800011c, 0x80000000);

//pll2_n1
WRITE(0xD8000110, 0x602c0801);   //xin from pll3_n2
WRITE(0xD8000114, 0x80000000);
WRITE(0xD8000114, 0xF3000000);
wait(220);                        // IDLE 220
WRITE(0xD8000114, 0x80000000);

/* ************************************************* */
/*                GPIO Driving 00~11                 */
/* ************************************************* */
// WRITE(0xD1000058, 0xAAAAAAAA); //GPIO15~ 0
// WRITE(0xD100005C, 0xAAAAAAAA); //GPIO31~16
// WRITE(0xD10000D8, 0xAAAAAAAA); //GPIO47~32
// WRITE(0xD10000DC, 0xAAAAAAAA); //GPIO63~48
// WRITE(0xD1000158, 0xAAAAAAAA); //GPIO79~64
// WRITE(0xD100015C, 0xAAAAAAAA); //GPIO95~80

//GPIO38 driving 0x11
  WRITE(0xD10000D8, 0xAAAABAAA); //GPIO47~32
//WRITE(0xD10000D8, 0xFFFFFAAA); //GPIO47~32
//WRITE(0xD10000DC, 0xFFFFFFFF); //GPIO63~48
//WRITE(0xD1000158, 0xAAFFFFFF); //GPIO79~64

/* ************************************************* */
/*           Pin Share Setting 0xD100_0000           */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD10000E0, 0x01000000);    // GPIO[39:32]
WRITE(0xD10000E4, 0x11111111);    // GPIO[47:40]
WRITE(0xD10000E8, 0x11111111);    // GPIO[55:48]
WRITE(0xD10000EC, 0x11111111);    // GPIO[63:56]
WRITE(0xD1000160, 0x00000111);    // GPIO[71:64]
WRITE(0xD1000164, 0x00000000);    // GPIO[79:72]

/* ************************************************* */
/*                 Pin Mux(120~138)                  */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD0000120, 0x1A191800);    // LD3_LD2_LD1_LD0
WRITE(0xD0000124, 0x03020100);    // LD7_LD6_LD5_LD4
WRITE(0xD0000128, 0x07060504);    // LD11_LD10_LD9_LD8
WRITE(0xD000012C, 0x0B0A0908);    // LD15_LD14_LD13_LD12
WRITE(0xD0000130, 0x0F0E0D0C);    // LD19_LD18_LD17_LD16
WRITE(0xD0000134, 0x13121110);    // LD23_LD22_LD21_LD20
WRITE(0xD0000138, 0x17161514);    // LD27_LD26_LD25_LD24
WRITE(0xD000013C, 0x00000000);    // LD31_LD30_LD29_LD28
WRITE(0xD0000140, 0x00000000);    // LD35_LD34_LD33_LD32
WRITE(0xD0000144, 0x00000000);    // 00_LD38_LD37_LD36
//PAD TYPE
WRITE(0xD0D00000, 0x468085E4);    // Pad Type, [23:22]='00':MIPI,'01':LVDS,'10':TTL,[8]:LDOPD

WRITE(0xD0000110, 0x00000000);    // PANEL IO output mode

/* ************************************************* */
/*            General Setting 0xd000_0000            */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD0000000, 0x00000077);    // DRAM mode, dclk
WRITE(0xD0000004, 0x0F7F0A60);    // SRC:RGB565, dst 24-bits
WRITE(0xD0000008, 0x02D00500);    // Layer1:W1280xH720
WRITE(0xD000000C, 0x00000A00);    // pitch=1280 X 2=2560
WRITE(0xD0000010, 0x00000000);    // baseA addr
WRITE(0xD0000014, 0x00000000);    // baseB addr
WRITE(0xD0000018, 0x00000000);    // baseC addr

/* ************************************************* */
/*                  Test Color Mode                  */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD0000020, 0x000000FF);    // test color mode=0, None

/* ************************************************* */
/*             Port Setting 0xD000_0000              */
/*   HS:40, HBP:220, HFP:110, VS:5, VBP:20, VFP:5    */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD0000070, 0x00010300);    // ctg_reset_on
wait(1);                          // 1 μs
WRITE(0xD0000070, 0x00000300);    // ctg_reset_off

WRITE(0xD0000070, 0x00000307);    // enable ctg 0 1 2
WRITE(0xD0000074, 0x02EE0672);    // htotal=0x0672, vtotal=0x02EE
//CTG0(Hsync)
WRITE(0xD0000078, 0x20010672);    // set0,p1, line x=htotal,        y=1
WRITE(0xD000007C, 0x10010028);    // set1,p2       x=HOR.SYNC TIME, y=1
WRITE(0xD0000080, 0x00000000);    // set0,p3(0x0,0)
WRITE(0xD0000084, 0x00000000);    // set0,p4(0x0,0)
//CTG1(Vsync)
WRITE(0xD0000088, 0x60010672);    // set0,p1 ,frame  x=htotal, y=1
WRITE(0xD000008C, 0x10060672);    // set1,p2         x=htotal, y=VER.SYNC TIME+1
WRITE(0xD0000090, 0x00000000);    // set0,p3(0x0,0)
WRITE(0xD0000094, 0x00000000);    // set0,p4(0x0,0)
//CTG2(DE)
WRITE(0xD0000098, 0x101B0104);    // set1,p1, line
WRITE(0xD000009C, 0x22EB0604);    // set0,p2 x=HOR.SYNC TIME+HBP+Hor. display area y=(VER.SYNC TIME+1)+VBP+1+Ver. display area
WRITE(0xD00000A0, 0x101B0104);    // set1,p3
WRITE(0xD00000A4, 0x22EB0604);    // set0,p4

/* ************************************************* */
/*                   Enable PANEL                    */
/* ************************************************* */
WRITE(0xD000001C, 0x00000001);    // SyncEn
wait(1); // IDLE 1                // 1 μs
WRITE(0xD000001C, 0x00000003);    // SyncEn DisplayEn
